chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 315 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.01 2. For order on CMA No.1090/2020 3. For hearing of main case 13.10.2025 This reference application is pending since 2020 without any progress. On 16.09.2025, the following order was passed: 16.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Taseer Khan, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant and requests for adjournment. This matter is pending since 2020 and no notice has been sought/issued till date. As an indulgence, adjourned to come up after two weeks. Even today applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
